session_note: S102 - Tower-Defense Combat Overhaul: 10-item owner playtest batch. This session ships items 1-8 (Batches 1+2); items 9-10 (laser turret + HELGA princess) are next session. Owner explicit approval ('full session batch approved, lets get to work!') = unlock_source:user. FULL tier; 3-way Council (ADOPT-WITH-FIXES, 6 must-fixes folded) + PRIME-AUDIT. Owner corrections: RAID = the existing player sever extended to also hit creatures (right-click chewer=1 kill, Voltkin=2); UNIFIED HP model (connectors HP=5 chewable, chewer HP=1, Voltkin HP=2); HELGA princess spec captured for next session. PDR: .claude/plans/2026-06-24_PDR_Session_102_TD_Combat_Overhaul.md
council_result: 1-round 3-way Council (Claude + Grok-ANALYST grok-4.20-reasoning + Gemini-AUDITOR gemini-2.5-pro) on the 10-item batch PDR. Grok: REWORK (foundations must precede consumers; host-local effects violate the 10Hz full-snapshot contract; damage model under-budgeted; need ONE shared area-damage helper). Gemini: ADOPT-WITH-FIXES (wire-sync visibility failure; incoherent two-path HP model; B4 builds generic entity AFTER bespoke; RAID strictly-better-than-potato). SYNTHESIS=ADOPT-WITH-FIXES+re-sequence. 6 must-fixes folded: MF1 unify death via damageCreature/applyAreaDamage (AoE=lethal through same path); MF2 client-visible feedback via synced-state-derived VFX (client diffs prev/curr creatures for death splat; gnaw off ATTACKING state; windup off nextFireTick) not transient effects; MF3 re-sequence foundations-first + touch applyCreatureAttack ONCE; MF4 one shared radius helper (potato refactored onto it); MF5 RAID balance (mooted by owner correction OC1 - raid is now precise single-target via the existing sever+charge); MF6 save-hp round-trip + client-intent-path + cause-exhaustiveness tests. PRIME-AUDIT: boot-then-smoke live verification mandatory; determinism gate per foundation (extend runCreatureStress = HARD gate); bond-hp additive-optional wire. Owner corrections OC1 (raid=existing sever extended to creatures) + OC2 (unified HP: connector 5, chewer 1, Voltkin 2) + OC3 (HELGA spec) authoritative.

priorities.label: S102 P1 - Quick wins (items 4,5,6,7): chewer buck-teeth render; regen owl-b NONET mask (bottom-left owl faded, wings cropped); NONET sudoku correct/wrong SFX (chipmunk yey / sad oww); verify spawner rebuild already works.
priorities.objective: Ship the four standalone quick wins with no combat-foundation coupling. #4 two large funny beaver buck-teeth (render only). #5 regenerate a wider owl-b matte so the bottom-left NONET owl's wings are visible (asset; still crush the stray veo flame). #6 chipmunk 'yey' on a correct sudoku cell, sad low 'oww' on a wrong one (render-local procedural SFX hooked at the keypress validating puzzle.solution[selected]). #7 verify destroy->rebuild of a chewer spawner already works (regression test + playtest); no code unless broken.
priorities.scope: #4 src/render/chewerRenderer.ts teeth loop -> 2 buck-teeth (+ relax chewerRenderer.test.ts rect>=4->>=2, add roundRect to mock if used). #5 public/art/nonet/owl-b-mask.png regen via assets-source/nonet-video/make_mask.py (wider opaque core covering wing span ~x117..423/540, still crop flame; extract owl-b.webm frames to verify wing/flame overlap first). #6 src/render/nonetJuice.ts add playNonetYey (high up-chirps) + playNonetOww (low descending sad tone, ORIGINAL not named Eeyore) via blip; src/render/sudokuOverlay.ts onKey '1'..'6' branch correct?yey:oww replacing the unconditional pop. #7 add destroy->rebuild regression test in pentagram.test.ts; confirm ignition de-dups on live creatureSpawners not godlyFiredThisMatch.
priorities.testing: tsc 0; full vitest green; teeth render test (>=2 incisors); NONET correct vs wrong fires the right synth (unit on the branch); owl fix verified by extracted-frame visual diff + live screenshot (bottom-left owl wings visible, flame still cropped); destroy->rebuild spawner regression test green; build exit 0 under 750 charter.

priorities.label: S102 P2 - HP/damage foundation + chewer feel (items 2,3 + unified HP): CONNECTOR_HP + creature HP; damageCreature/applyAreaDamage; ONE applyCreatureAttack refactor; chewers melee close-in (#3); gnaw audio replaces lightning (#2); green-goo VFX/SFX; damaged-connector render.
priorities.objective: Build the coherent unified HP/damage foundation ONCE and land the two chewer-feel fixes on it. Foundation A: Bond.hp (CONNECTOR_HP=5, chew=1 dmg, 5 chews sever; replaces per-creature chewProgress; multi-chewer stacking; damaged-bond render) + creature hp (chewer 1, Voltkin 2) round-tripped in save. Foundation B: findNearestEnemyCreature (lowest-id tie-break). Foundation D: green-goo CREATURE death VFX (client-driven by prev/curr creature diff per MF2) + procedural fly-splat SFX. Refactor applyCreatureAttack ONCE to a bond-OR-creature target. #3: chewers engage at true melee (~35px) via per-type attackRange + skip the global SPAWNER_POS repulse for chewers, Voltkin 180^2 byte-identical. #2: chewer sever uses NEW cause:'chewer' (no lightning, no ARC_FLASH, no screen-shake); every chew plays a 3-pulse 'tchhht' gnaw derived from the synced ATTACKING state; sever on the 5th.
priorities.scope: Bond.hp + makeBond default + chew decrement + sever-on-0; creature hp on Creature + CreatureConfig + makeCreature; damageCreature + applyAreaDamage shared helper (potato refactored onto it, sorted-CreatureId, sourceSpawnerId-gated); findNearestEnemyCreature; CREATURE_SPLAT/goo render (client prev/curr-diff driven) + playSplatSFX + playGnawSFX (procedural); isWithinAttackRange per-type config (chewer attackRange~35); creatureVerlet skip global repulse for chewers; applyCreatureAttack branch type==='chewer' (cause:'chewer', suppress ARC_FLASH) + creature-target branch; main.ts gate screen-shake for chewer; effects.ts BOND_SEVERED.cause add 'chewer'; bond renderer damage visual; save round-trip Bond.hp + creature hp (additive-optional); extend runCreatureStress (HARD gate); replay re-baseline. PROTOCOL bump deferred to P3 (or here if bond-hp wire lands first).
priorities.testing: tsc 0; full vitest green; bond hp decrements on chew, severs at 0; raid/Voltkin still instant-sever a connector; chewer engages at melee (unit on isWithinAttackRange per-config); chewer sever emits cause:'chewer' not lightning; gnaw derivable from ATTACKING state; Voltkin replay BYTE-IDENTICAL (auto-delete@1200/DESPAWN@1140 unchanged); damageCreature decrement+despawn; potato still kills chewers via the shared helper; save round-trip bond.hp + creature hp (load a damaged Voltkin hp=1 -> stays 1 not 2); extend runCreatureStress byte-identical 2 seeds; build under 750.

priorities.label: S102 P3 - Raid-on-creatures (#1) + Voltkin attacks chewers (#8): RAID_CREATURE client-intent (right-click a chewer=1 kill / Voltkin=2 -> lightning-cloud); Voltkin hunts+pops enemy chewers; protocol bump; final replay re-baseline + byte-budget.
priorities.objective: Land the two combat consumers on the P2 foundation. #1 RAID = the existing player sever EXTENDED to creatures: RMB picks a creature first (pickCreature), else a bond; a creature hit dispatches RAID_CREATURE{creatureId,playerId} (host-authoritative, charge-gated, -> damageCreature 1 dmg) -> chewer (hp1) pops with green-goo+fly-splat, Voltkin (hp2) needs 2 -> discombobulate lightning-cloud. Orphaned chewers (dead spawner) still raid-killable. #8 Voltkin targets enemy chewers too (findNearestEnemyCreature) + creature-target branch -> damageCreature; chewer half already enemy-bond-only (correct). Intentionally breaks Voltkin replay byte-equivalence -> accepted regression + re-baseline.
priorities.scope: world.ts RAID_CREATURE action + dispatch + targetCreatureId on Creature; controls.ts RMB pickCreature-first; net/protocol.ts RAID_CREATURE in CLIENT_INTENT_TYPES + PROTOCOL_VERSION bump (10->11); damageCreature creature-target path in applyCreatureAttack for Voltkin; Voltkin pre-tick target selection tries findNearestEnemyCreature; LIGHTNING_CLOUD death VFX for Voltkin (client prev/curr-diff driven), green-goo for chewer; lightning-cloud SFX; save round-trip targetCreatureId; final runCreatureStress extension (chewer-vs-creature + raid path) + byte-budget assertion + re-baseline.
priorities.testing: tsc 0; full vitest green; RAID_CREATURE charge-gated + enemy-only + 1 dmg (chewer dies, Voltkin survives 1 / dies on 2); orphaned-chewer raid-killable; client-dispatched RAID_CREATURE reaches host (intent path test); RAID_CREATURE in CLIENT_INTENT, TD internals not; Voltkin kills a chewer (hp1)+emits goo; findNearestEnemyCreature determinism (lowest-id); cause:'chewer' exhaustiveness (no other cause-switch breaks); runCreatureStress byte-identical 2 seeds; byte-budget under ceiling; build under 750; LIVE deploy verified gh run list deploy.yml SUCCESS; boot-then-smoke: press raid on a chewer -> pops+goo+splat+1 charge; Voltkin near enemy chewer walks over+pops it.

session_status: S102 - IN PROGRESS. TD combat overhaul (items 1-8 this session; 9-10 HELGA+laser next). PDR locked + Council ADOPT-WITH-FIXES + owner corrections (raid=sever-extended-to-creatures; unified HP connector5/chewer1/Voltkin2; HELGA spec). Starting P1 (quick wins).

Generic Defender entity (kind:'turret') + recipe generalization (Foundation C+E) built FIRST. Fires every 1800 ticks; 5 client-visible windup rings (derived from nextFireTick); WIRE-SYNCED red Looney-Tunes beam; kills nearest enemy creature (chewer 1 hit -> goo, Voltkin 2 -> lightning-cloud). Original turret art.

Item 10 (NEXT SESSION) - HELGA princess: recipe = central Triangle hub + 3 Spirals (3 Warped Anchors) + 3 Circles (3 Stars), single component; Star detected by unordered {Triangle,Circle} type-set. Stationary; slaps nearest enemy creature only (never structures), chewer 1 / Voltkin 2. HELGA = Bavarian dirndl + beer stein in one hand + slaps with the other; Courage-the-Cowardly-Dog art style; ORIGINAL character (not Peach/not a CtCD copy). MUST be a real functioning state-driven animated character (idle/sip/acquire/windup/slap/react), NOT a looping gif and NOT a procedural transform-twitch. See memory helga-princess-spec.
